App.Title: Character Generation
App.NamePlaceholder: Type a name or click dice...

Resume.Label: Start new character or resume a saved session

Session.LogIntro: This journal entry stores an in-progress or completed character generation session.

Steps.BasicTraining: Basic training: pick one service skill (level 0)
Steps.CrisisPayEmergency: Crisis! Pay Cr{amount} for emergency care?
Steps.CDEEChooseTermsInCareer: Choose number of terms to serve in {career} (max {max})
Steps.CDEEChooseSecondSkillTable: New career: pick one service skill to start at level 0
Steps.CDEEFirstTermMainSkill: First term: pick one service skill to start at level 1
Steps.CDEEHomeworldSkillAt1: Homeworld ({type}): pick one skill at level 1
Steps.CDEEFreeSkillPick: Free Skill: choose any one skill at level 1
Steps.CUBonusSkillPickTable: Bonus skill: choose a table to roll 1D6 on
Steps.CUInjuredPickPhysical: Badly injured: choose physical characteristic to reduce by 1
Steps.CUAgeBracketLate20sOpt: Late Twenties–Early Thirties (optional skill level total 5)
Steps.CUAgeBracketLate30sOpt: Late Thirties–Early Forties (optional skill level total 6)
Steps.CUAgeBracketLate40sOpt: Late Forties–Early Fifties (optional skill level total 6)

Warnings.rulesetMismatch: Chargen: career '{name}' ruleset '{ruleset}' does not match requested ruleset '{requested}'

Options.NoSkipHomeworldEducation: No — skip homeworld, pick from education list only
Options.PurchaseRank: Purchase Rank (1 roll = 1 rank + 1 bonus skill)

OptionalRules.ChooseTL: Choose Technology Level (TL) for aging DM
OptionalRules.SummaryBenefitReduction: Benefits reduction applied due to career switching.
OptionalRules.ChooseMusterCareer: Choose career for muster out roll

Steps.BackgroundSkillPick: {background}: choose one background skill at level 1
Steps.FirstTermServiceSkill: First term: choose one Service skill at level 1

Options.TraitEnterLater: Record trait later on the actor sheet

Logs.SurvivedCrisis: Survived aging crisis; affected characteristics set to 1 and career ends.
Logs.BenefitSkillUnavailable: Benefit skill: no eligible skills remain; skip.

Muster.ChooseCareer: Choose career for muster out roll
Muster.BenefitSkillPrompt: Benefit skill: choose a skill to raise by +1

SkillCap.ReducePrompt: SOC skill cap INT+EDU={cap}; reduce skill ({total}/{cap})

Species.ModeSpeciesCareer: Non-human — species career (no background; one fewer trait)
Species.ModeHybrid: Non-human — human career with species abilities (human career events; no background; one fewer trait)
Species.ModeRevenant: Revenant (human career and background; undead modifiers after mustering out)
Species.LogRevenantIntro: Species: Revenant (SRD — apply stat modifiers after mustering out).
Species.LogRevenantMods: Revenant: applied +2 END, −2 SOC (after mustering out).
Species.LogHybridTradeoff: Hybrid: using human career skill tables, mustering out, and events (not species-specific events).
Species.LogCentaurDice: Centaur: rolled +{dStr} STR and +{dEnd} END from 1d6 each.
Species.NoCareersInPool: No SOC careers found for this species mode. Rebuild packs or check compendium.
Species.SpeciesCareerMissingFromPack: SOC: species career "{career}" was not found in your loaded careers compendium. Rebuild packs or enable the SOC careers pack.
Species.GnomeSpellsDeferred: Gnome starting spells: record 3 spells on the actor sheet.

Errors.ActorCreateUnsupportedRuleset: Cannot create actor: character generation is not registered for ruleset "{ruleset}".
Errors.RulesetDowngraded: Character generation ruleset "{ruleset}" is not available; session was switched to Cepheus Engine (CE).
Errors.RulesetNotSupported: Character generation is not available for the selected ruleset "{ruleset}". Choose CE, CU, CDEE, or SOC in world settings, register support via the twodsix.registerCharGen hook.

Tag.ImproveCheckSkill: +1 to the skill you rolled for the check

Checks.InjuryWorstPrompt: Two injury rolls were made. Which result applies? (Lower effect is worse; you may pick any.)
Checks.NamedTableMissing: Chargen table “{id}” is not defined for this ruleset.
Checks.PickCareerColumn: Pick one skill from the career’s {column} list (no qualification check).

Branches.HalflingArrestedPrompt: Arrested: after losing a Benefit roll, what happens?
Branches.ThievesGuildPrompt: The thieves’ guild makes an offer. What do you do?
Branches.CDEEEliteConspiracyPrompt: A conspiracy against a dominant corporation: do you refuse the invitation or accept?
Branches.CDEEEliteCorporateInfightingPrompt: Corporate infighting: do you support the questionable executive, or attempt to discredit them?
Branches.CDEEEliteCorporateSupportExec: Refuse to discredit — support the exec (gain a Contact and an Enemy)
Branches.CDEEScholarImmoralResearchPrompt: Immoral research: how do you respond?
Branches.CDEEScholarImmoralAccept: Accept (gain a level in Science, Deception, or Medicine)
Branches.CDEEScholarImmoralWhistle: Blow the whistle (the project lead becomes an Enemy)
Branches.CDEEScholarConfidentialPrompt: Confidential project: keep silent or sell the results?
Branches.CDEEScholarConfidentialSilent: Keep quiet (gain Science, Liaison, or Medicine)
Branches.CDEEScholarConfidentialSell: Sell to a rival (extra Benefit roll; the organization becomes an Enemy)
Branches.CDEEScholarPlagiarismPrompt: Plagiarism: exploit the opportunity or walk away?
Branches.CDEEScholarPlagiarismExploit: Exploit (extra Benefit roll; the victim becomes an Enemy)
Branches.CDEEScholarTalentGrabPrompt: Talent grab: try to escape or go along?
Branches.CDEEScholarTalentGrabEscape: Try to escape (DEX 8+ to avoid Injury)
Branches.CDEEScholarTalentGrabJumpShip: Jump ship (extra Benefit roll; former employer becomes an Enemy)
Branches.CDEERogueRatPrompt: Inform on a rival criminal: betray them or stay silent?
Branches.CDEERogueRatBetray: Betray to authorities (extra Benefit roll; they become an Enemy)
Branches.CDEERogueRatSilent: Stay silent (the rivalry ends; they become a Contact)
Branches.CDEERogueCaughtPrompt: Caught by authorities: defend yourself in court or hire a lawyer?
Branches.CDEERogueCaughtLawyer: Hire a lawyer (lose one Benefit roll; gain Lawyer as a Contact)
Branches.CDEEColonistCrimePrompt: A criminal gang: avoid the offer or join in?
Branches.CDEEColonistCrimeAvoid: Avoid (the gang leader becomes an Enemy)
Branches.CDEEColonistCrimeJoin: Join (Admin, Stealth, or Streetwise 8+ for an extra Benefit; fail = Prison)
Branches.CDEEColonistStrifePrompt: Colonial strife: join the rebels or stay clear?
Branches.CDEEColonistStrifeJoin: Join rebels (Gun Combat or Demolitions; then Gun Combat 8+ or Injury)
Branches.CDEEColonistUndergroundPrompt: Underground politics: turn them in or join?
Branches.CDEEColonistUndergroundTurnIn: Turn them in (Benefit roll; escaped leader becomes an Enemy)
Branches.CDEEColonistUndergroundJoin: Join (Demolitions, Stealth, or Streetwise 8+ for the leader as Contact; fail = Prison)
Branches.CDEEMerchantSmugglerPrompt: Smuggling offer: accept the job or decline?
Branches.CDEEMerchantSmugglerAccept: Accept (Admin or Streetwise 8+; success = +1 to that skill + extra Benefit; fail = Enemy)

CDEE.SurvivedCrisisRetire: Survived crisis — must retire from current career.

BenefitGamble.OptionalRiskPrompt: Gambling ring: risk one muster-out benefit roll on this check?
BenefitGamble.OptionalRiskPromptPrison: Prison smuggling: risk one muster-out benefit roll on Streetwise 8+?
BenefitGamble.RiskNo: No — decline (no check; no benefit change)
BenefitGamble.NoRollsToRisk: No benefit rolls available to stake; cannot gamble.
BenefitGamble.DeclinedOptional: Declined to stake a benefit roll (no check).
BenefitGamble.ChooseRiskCount: Risky business ({career}): how many benefit rolls do you stake? You have {prospective} total now (0–{max}).
BenefitGamble.StakeZero: 0 — stake nothing (still roll Admin or Streetwise for skill only)
BenefitGamble.OptionalWon: Won the gamble: +1 extra benefit roll.
BenefitGamble.MultiSuccess: Success: gained {gained} extra benefit roll(s) (½ of {staked}, rounded up).

CDEE.StateBenefitDMNext: Benefit DM: +{dm} on next muster-out roll.
CDEE.StatePurchasedRank: Purchased rank {rank} in {career} with benefit roll.

ActiveEffects.ConfirmDelete: Do you really want to delete effect?

rulesetChange.title: Change ruleset
rulesetChange.content:
Do you want to change ruleset?
If you have custom options they will be erased. This step cannot be undone.

Actor.CharacteristicEdit: Toggle Edit Mode for Characteristic Short Names

Skills.SkillRollTooltip: Shows the skill roll dialog. Shift-clicking rolls a skill check applying no modifier and assumes an average difficulty of 6 or 8
Skills.InvertedSkillRollTooltip: Rolls a skill check applying no modifier and assumes a difficulty of 8. Shift-clicking shows the skill roll dialog

Actor.SpeciesReadonly: Species is controlled by the species item on this actor; edit or delete the species item to change this field.

Tabs.FinancesTabTooltip: Cash on Hand, Debt, Pension, Living Costs, etc.
Tabs.InventoryTabTooltip: Weapons, Armor, Augments, Equipment & Tools, Consumables and Attachements

Movement.MovementConfigHint: Configure the movement speed and special movement attributes of this creature.

Roll.TiedRoll: Tied contested / opposed roll. No winner.
Roll.RequestRollDescription: Select any Tokens from which you would like to request a skill/check roll. A pop-up dialog opens where you can select the particulars of the roll.

Handlebars.CantShowCharacteristic: You need to reselect the characteristic for all skills marked with XXX. Sorry...

Component.pctHullPerUnit: Percent of base hull value per unit

Skills.SimplifiedSkillNameDescription:
Used in roll formulas as @skills._SKILL_NAME_.
@skills._SKILL_NAME__ defaults to zero if the skill is missing or below zero.

Traits.ShortDescAndEffects: Short description and list of effects

Species.AlreadyHasSpecies: Actor already has a species ({name}). Use only one species per actor.

Career.ChargenExtensionsInvalidJson: Chargen extensions must be valid JSON representing an object.

TechLevelNotes.1: Bronze or iron tools, early agriculture

LawLevelNotes.0: No restrictions; candidate for Amber Zone status
LawLevelNotes.1: Poison gas, explosives, undetectable weapons, weapons of mass destruction restricted
LawLevelNotes.4: Light assault weapons and submachine guns restricted
LawLevelNotes.6: All firearms except shotguns and stunners restricted; carrying weapons discouraged
LawLevelNotes.9: Any weapons outside one's residence restricted; candidate for Amber Zone status
LawLevelNotes.A: Any weapons allowed at all; candidate for Amber Zone status
LawLevelNotes.B: Any weapons allowed at all; candidate for Amber Zone status
LawLevelNotes.C: Any weapons allowed at all; candidate for Amber Zone status
LawLevelNotes.D: Any weapons allowed at all; candidate for Amber Zone status
LawLevelNotes.E: Any weapons allowed at all; candidate for Amber Zone status
LawLevelNotes.F: Any weapons allowed at all; candidate for Amber Zone status

GovernmentNotes.1: Owned by a company or corporation

HydrographicsNotes.9: Only a few small islands and archipelagos

TradeCode.Lt: Low Technology: Tech Level 5 or less

Trade.GoodsPricingTableNote: Table values include per-good trade code modifiers. Purchase prices are shown only for goods available from this supplier.
Trade.PurchasePricingNote: 💰 Buying from suppliers: Base check below is before per-good trade code modifiers (see table). Prices include local broker commission when enabled.
Trade.MarketReferenceNote: 💰 Selling to buyers: Base check below is before per-good trade code modifiers (see table). Prices include local broker commission when enabled. Actual profit requires selling on a different world with different trade codes.
Trade.GenerateHelp: Click the button to generate speculative trade information based on the Cepheus Engine SRD rules. This simulates finding suppliers, available goods, and price negotiations.
Trade.TraderSkillHelp: Enter the Broker skill to use (-5 to 15). If local broker is checked, this is the local broker's skill (0-4, capped by starport). Otherwise it is the trader's skill level and relevant characteristic modifier.
Trade.UseLocalBrokerHelp: When checked, the broker skill input uses the local broker's skill instead of the trader's. Local broker skill is capped by starport class and adds a commission to the final price.
Trade.BuyerModifierHelp: Positive numbers represent favorable buyer situations. Negative numbers represent difficult sales. (e.g., +2 for eager buyer, -3 for reluctant market). Default: 0
Trade.SupplierModifierHelp: Positive numbers represent tough suppliers. Negative numbers represent favorable supply. (e.g., +2 for hard bargain, -3 for eager seller). Default: 0
Trade.RestrictTradeCodesLabel: Restrict trade goods to world trade codes
Trade.RestrictTradeCodesHelp: When enabled, only trade goods matching this world's trade codes are available to buy.
Trade.SameWorldCapHelp: When enabled, sale prices are capped at purchase prices for goods available on this world.
Trade.IncludeIllegalHelp: Show illegal goods in the lists (black market).
Trade.SupplierInfoSummary: Found {count} types of goods at supplier. Starport bonus: +{starportBonus}. Good supply situation: +{supplierBonus}.
Trade.SupplierInfoUnusual: Unusual Cargo listed below; GM sets prices.
Trade.AvailableGoodsNote: YOU PAY suppliers these prices to buy goods from this world.
Trade.PriceModifierBaseNote: of base price (base check, before per-good trade DMs)
Trade.CargoItemsCreated: {count} cargo item(s) created on the world sheet.
Trade.NoCargoToCreate: No purchasable goods available to create as cargo.
Trade.NoCargoToTransfer: This cargo has no quantity to transfer.
Trade.WorldCargoHelp: Drag cargo items from this list onto a ship sheet to purchase and load them.
Trade.CopiedToClipboard: Trade report copied to clipboard as HTML!

MGT2E.BrokerInformerEvent: The local broker is secretly an informer or agent (MGT2E p.242).

Item.LowerQuality: Goods are of lower quality than promised

Supplier.Fake: Supplier was using a fake identity
Supplier.PriceChange: Supplier demands a higher price at the last minute
Supplier.UnderStrength: Supplier provided less than the agreed amount

World.Bribe: Official demands a bribe to process the deal
World.PortFee: Unexpected port fees applied to the deal
World.SafetyViolation: Ship cited for safety violations during loading

Log.TradeLoopErrorDetail: An error occurred: {message}. Please check the console (F12) for details.
Log.SearchFailed: Failed to find any {type}s using the {method} method.
Log.SearchMethodNotAvailable: The {method} search method is not available at this world.
Log.NoBrokersAvailable: No local brokers available at this {starport}-class starport.
Log.BrokerAlreadyHired: A local Skill-{skill} broker is already active. Dismiss them before hiring another.
Log.ForcedCargoLiquidation: Emergency liquidation: sold {lots} cargo lot(s) for net Cr{revenue}. Credits: Cr{credits}.
Log.ForcedFreightPayout: Emergency freight settlement: received Cr{revenue}. Credits: Cr{credits}.
Log.HiredBroker: Hired local Skill-{skill} broker. They will take a {commission}% commission on all trades.
Log.NoAffordableGoods: No affordable goods available from suppliers.
Log.Refueled: Refueled {tons} tons of {quality} fuel for Cr{cost}.
Log.PurchasedFuel: Purchased {tons}t {quality} fuel. Cost: Cr{cost}. Credits: Cr{credits}.
Log.PurchasedFuelPartial: Purchased {tons}t {quality} fuel (partial load). Cost: Cr{cost}. Credits: Cr{credits}. Fuel: {current}/{capacity}t.
Log.SkimmedFuel: Skimmed {tons}t fuel from gas giant. Time: {time} hours. Fuel is unrefined.
Log.CheatRefueled: CHEAT: Magically refueled {tons}t at {world}. Cost: Cr{cost}. Fuel is unrefined. Credits: Cr{credits}.
Log.CheatScrounged: CHEAT: Scrounged {tons}t fuel at {world}. Took {days} days. Fuel is unrefined.
Log.PrivateMessagesAccepted: {name} was approached to carry private messages. Honorarium: Cr{honorarium}. Credits: Cr{credits}.
Log.PrivateMessagesAlreadyAccepted: Private messages already accepted this visit. Cannot accept again.
Log.AdditionalPortFees: Additional port fees for {days} extra day(s): Cr{cost}. Credits: Cr{credits}.
Log.NoWorldsInRangeConsider: No worlds within jump range! Consider increasing jump rating or refueling.
Log.ChangeDestForfeit: Changing destination will forfeit the private message payment (Cr{credits}). Continue?
Log.CharterEnded: Charter period has ended. Ship space is now available.
Log.InJumpSpace: In jump space for {days} days. Fuel consumed: {fuel}t. Remaining: {remaining}t.
Log.RoughJump: Unrefined fuel caused a rough jump! Minor damage sustained, but arrived safely.
Log.DestinationNotFound: Error: Destination world {name} ({hex}) not found in world list. Game over.
Log.FirstTimeVisit: First time visiting {world} in this trading session! The local tourist board sends a brochure!
Log.DiscoveryNeighbors: Discovery! Loading neighboring subsectors revealed {count} worlds.
Log.DiscoveryJumpRange: Discovery! Higher jump range ({jump}) revealed this list of potential destinations: {names}.
Log.InsufficientFuel: Insufficient fuel! Need {need}t for jump, have {have}t.
Log.WarningNoFuelAtDest: WARNING: {world} has no refueling facilities (Class {starport} starport, no gas giants). After this jump you'll have {remaining}t fuel remaining, but need {need}t for another jump. You may get stranded!
Log.DepartedFor: Departed {origin} for {destination}. Passengers: {high}H/{mid}M/{steerage}S/{low}L. Freight: {freight}t. {mail}Expected delivery revenue: Cr{revenue}.
Log.SmugglingSuccess: Successfully smuggled illegal goods past Law Level {law} authorities.
Log.SmugglingFailure: Smuggling detected! The Law Level {law} authorities have confiscated illegal goods and issued a fine.
Log.SmugglingHarassment: Illegal cargo attracted Law Level {law} police harassment. Resolve avoidance with Streetwise or Admin.
Log.UsedBulkSupplies: Used {tons}t of {type} bulk life support supplies.
Log.MaintenanceSkippedDamage: Maintenance skipped! Ship suffers {hits} hit(s) of system degradation (rolled {roll}+{skipped}={total}). Emergency repair cost: Cr{repairCost}. Credits: Cr{credits}.
Log.MaintenanceSkippedNoDamage: Maintenance skipped this month (rolled {roll}+{skipped}={total}, need {threshold}+). No damage... yet.
Log.MonthlyCostsSummary: Monthly costs (month {month}): Crew Cr{crew}, Life support Cr{ls}{lsExtra}, Maintenance Cr{maint}{maintExtra}, Mortgage Cr{mortgage}. Total: Cr{total}. Credits: Cr{credits}.
Log.BankruptcyRunwayWarning: Warning: at current burn rate, no-income projection next month is Cr{projected} (bankruptcy threshold Cr-{threshold}). Minimum profit needed next month to avoid bankruptcy: Cr{shortfall}.
Log.BlackMarketActivated: Black market contacts activated. Illegal goods may now be available.
Log.NoPassengersAvailable: No passengers are available at this port.
Log.BookedPassengers: Booked {count} {type} passenger(s). Revenue on delivery: Cr{revenue}.
Log.PassengerMarket: Passenger market: {high} high, {mid} middle, {steerage} steerage, {low} low available at {world}.
Log.NoFreightAvailable: No freight available ({offered} tons offered, {free} tons free cargo space).
Log.LoadedFreight: Loaded {tons} tons of freight. Revenue on delivery: Cr{revenue}.
Log.MailContractSecured: Mail contract secured! Cr{revenue} on delivery. (5 tons required).
Log.AlreadyCarryingMail: Already carrying mail for this trip.
Log.AlreadyCheckedMail: Already checked for mail contracts this visit — no new contracts available.
Log.NoMailAvailable: No mail contracts available at this time.
Log.NoCargoSpaceSpeculative: No free cargo space for speculative goods.
Log.InsufficientCreditsBroker: Insufficient credits to cover purchase price and broker commission (Total needed: Cr{total}).
Log.BoughtGoods: Bought {qty}t {type} at Cr{price} per ton. Total cost: Cr{total}.
Log.NoBuyerFoundAtPort: No buyer found at this port
Log.IllegalSalesBlocked: Illegal sales blocked by police harassment
Log.SoldGoods: Sold {qty}t {type} at Cr{price} per ton. Total: Cr{total}.
Log.NoFreeCargoSpaceBulk: No free cargo space for bulk supplies.
Log.BulkLifeSupportDisabled: Bulk life support is not available under the current ruleset.
Log.NoBulkSuppliesToSell: No bulk life support supplies to sell.
Log.SoldBulkSupplies: Sold {qty}t {type} at Cr{price} per ton. Total: Cr{total}.
Log.DestinationClearedForfeited: Destination cleared. Private message payment forfeited: Cr{credits}.
Log.NoWorldsInRangeJournal: No known worlds within jump range! Checking {journal}... found {count} worlds.
Log.NoWorldsInRangeLocal: No known worlds within jump range! Rescanning folder... found {count} worlds.
Log.WorldNotFound: Error: Location {hex} not found in world list! Unable to proceed.
Log.MortgagePaid: The ship mortgage is fully paid off! The Free Trader is yours. Congratulations!
Log.Repossessed: Unable to cover expenses. The bank has repossessed the ship. Game over...
Log.CharterEvictionSold: Charter eviction: sold {tons}t {good} at Cr{price}/t. Revenue: Cr{revenue}.
Log.CharterEvictionDumped: Charter eviction: dumped {tons}t freight. Refunded Cr{refund}.
Log.CharterEvictionPax: Charter eviction: evicted {count} {type} passenger(s). Refunded Cr{refund}.
Log.CharterStarted: Ship chartered to {destination}. {cargo}t cargo, {staterooms} stateroom(s), {lowBerths} low berth(s). Fee: Cr{fee}. Charter expires day {day}. Credits: Cr{credits}.
Log.CharterAutoRefuelRefined: Auto-refueled {tons}t refined fuel for charter departure. Cost: Cr{cost}.
Log.CharterAutoRefuelRefinedPartial: Auto-refueled {tons}t refined fuel (partial) for charter departure. Cost: Cr{cost}.
Log.CharterAutoRefuelUnrefined: Auto-refueled {tons}t unrefined fuel for charter departure. Cost: Cr{cost}.
Log.CharterAutoRefuelUnrefinedPartial: Auto-refueled {tons}t unrefined fuel (partial) for charter departure. Cost: Cr{cost}.
Log.CharterAutoRefuelGasGiant: Auto-refueled {tons}t from gas giant for charter departure. Time: {time} hours. Fuel is unrefined.
Log.CharterWarningFuel: WARNING: Unable to fully refuel for charter departure! Proceeding with insufficient fuel.

Setup.Title: Trading Setup

Prompts.RefuelUnrefinedPartialOption: Unrefined fuel — WARNING: can only afford {affordable}t of {needed}t needed (Cr{cost})
Prompts.MaintenanceDue: Monthly maintenance due (Cr{cost}). Pay or skip?

Actions.ClearDestinationConfirm: Yes, clear destination and forfeit payment
Actions.ChangeDestinationConfirm: Yes, change destination and forfeit payment
Actions.PrivateMessages: (If available, ask your GM) Take private messages

Charter.Confirm: Charter {cargo}t cargo, {staterooms} stateroom(s), {lowBerths} low berth(s) for 2 weeks. Fee: Cr{fee}.

App.Title: Trader
App.OutcomeBankrupt: Bankrupt. The ship has been repossessed.

CrewSetup.Hint: Assign a crew member to each position. Use Open Character Generation to create new traveller actors first, then click Refresh to see them in the dropdowns. You can also drag an actor from the Actors sidebar onto a row.

Cheat.BuyFuel: CHEAT: Ask your GM if you can buy unrefined fuel at extortionate cost. Somehow. ({tons}t) — Cr{cost} ({multiplier}x price)
Cheat.ScroungeFuel: CHEAT: Ask your GM if you can spend a week begging, scrounging and stealing enough fuel to fill the tank. Somehow. ({tons}t) — Free (takes {days} days, unrefined)

WorldSource.Title: World Source
WorldSource.Prompt: Choose how to load worlds for trading:

LocalSetup.RootFolderHint: Select a folder containing sector subfolders with world actors.
LocalSetup.NoWorldsFound: No world actors found in the selected folder. Create Actor folders named after sectors and add world-type actors (with UWP and coordinates) inside them.
LocalSetup.NoWorldsFoundShort: No world actors found in the selected folder.
LocalSetup.Title: Local Trading Setup

Migration.Completed: Twodsix System Migration to version {version} completed!
Migration.DoNotClose: Migrating Twodsix to {version}. Do not close your game or shut down your server.
Migration.MigrationError0.6.25: Migration error: Couldn't parse price for ${name}, it was ${price} but is now 0.

Rolls.MakesParryRoll: Makes a melee combat skill check to parry attack with

absoluteBonusValueForEachTimeIncrement.hint: Leave empty to use default (+/-1). Not currently used.
absoluteBonusValueForEachTimeIncrement.name: What bonus/penalty to give per each time increment change in a task.

absoluteCriticalEffectValue.hint: Defaults to 99, which means that effect is ignored.
absoluteCriticalEffectValue.name: What effect is required for a throw to be considered a critical success/failure (i.e. be colored green/red).

shortSTR.hint: Short name for strength characteristic. It should be four characters or fewer.
shortSTR.name: Short name for strength characteristic

shortDEX.hint: Short name for dexterity characteristic. It should be four characters or fewer.
shortDEX.name: Short name for dexterity characteristic

shortEND.hint: Short name for endurance characteristic. It should be four characters or fewer.
shortEND.name: Short name for endurance characteristic

shortINT.hint: Short name for intelligence characteristic. It should be four characters or fewer.
shortINT.name: Short name for intelligence characteristic

shortSOC.hint: Short name for social standing characteristic. It should be four characters or fewer.
shortSOC.name: Short name for social standing characteristic

shortEDU.hint: Short name for education characteristic. It should be four characters or fewer.
shortEDU.name: Short name for education characteristic

shortPSI.hint: Short name for psionic strength characteristic. It should be four characters or fewer.
shortPSI.name: Short name for psionic strength characteristic

alternativeShort1.hint: Short name for first alternative characteristic. It should be four characters or fewer.
alternativeShort1.name: Short name for alternative characteristic 1

alternativeShort2.hint: Short name for second alternative characteristic. It should be four characters or fewer.
alternativeShort2.name: Short name for alternative characteristic 2

alternativeShort3.hint: Short name for third alternative characteristic. It should be four characters or fewer.
alternativeShort3.name: Short name for alternative characteristic 3

autofireRulesUsed.hint: Select which variant's auto/burst fire rules should be used.
autofireRulesUsed.name: Select which variant's auto/burst fire rules should be used.

automateDamageRollOnHit.hint: When effect > 0 and the item causes damage: checked = Roll damage, modified by effect of skill roll. unchecked = Don't roll damage (button to roll damage on chat card should appear).
automateDamageRollOnHit.name: Automatically roll damage for skill rolls that hit.

criticalNaturalAffectsEffect.hint: checked=Regardless of success consider a natural 2 to have an effect of -1 and a 12 to have an effect of 0, unchecked=Use normal rules
criticalNaturalAffectsEffect.name: Whether a natural 2 or 12 should have special treatment as regards to success/failure.

defaultTokenSettings.hint: Automatically set advised prototype token settings to newly created Actors.
defaultTokenSettings.name: Default Prototype Token Settings

difficultiesAsTargetNumber.hint: checked=Use target number rather than modifier for difficulties, unchecked=Use modifiers
difficultiesAsTargetNumber.name: Use target numbers rather than modifiers for difficulties.

difficultyListUsed.hint: Select which variant's difficulty list should be used.
difficultyListUsed.name: Select which variant's difficulty list should be used.

effectOrTotal.hint: checked=Show effect (i.e. roll+modifiers-target number, usually 6 or 8), unchecked=Show total (i.e. roll+modifiers)
effectOrTotal.name: Show effect or total roll value for skill and characteristic rolls.

ExperimentalFeatures.hint: checked=Boldly use ugly and buggy experimental features that just maybe won't delete your game world, unchecked=Hide them like any sane person would
ExperimentalFeatures.name: Show ugly, buggy and unfinished features. I.e., kind of like all the other features that are not hidden by this flag. :)

hideUntrainedSkills.hint: Hide all untrained skills (those with a level < 0) and instead show a single pseudo-skill named 'Untrained'. This also makes it so new skills are added at 0 level instead of the untrained skill value. checked=Show pseudo-skill 'Untrained' instead of all untrained skills. unchecked=Show all untrained skills
hideUntrainedSkills.name: Hide all untrained skills
hideUntrainedSkills.warningReset:
After saving the system settings, all skills using the pseudo-skill 'Untrained'
will be permanently reset to using no skill. This action cannot be undone.
hideUntrainedSkills.warningUpdateWeapon: After saving the system settings all actors' weapons that do not have a skill will be updated to use the pseudo-skill Untrained.This action cannot be undone.

armorDamageFormula.hint: Use VTT roll math without dice terms '@damage'/'@effectiveArmor' are replaced with the damage/effective armor. default behaviour: "@damage-@effectiveArmor"
armorDamageFormula.name: Armor damage reduction formula

invertSkillRollShiftClick.hint: Clicking on a skill roll or dragging damage to a character normally shows a dialog, shift-clicking applies default values (Average skill roll or automatic damage distribution). Checking this box swaps this behavior.
invertSkillRollShiftClick.name: Invert behavior for shift-clicking for skill rolls and shift-dragging for taking damage

lifebloodInsteadOfCharacteristics.hint: Show END and 'Lifeblood' (uses STR below the covers) as characteristics. Useful for Cepheus Atom, Barbaric!, etc.
lifebloodInsteadOfCharacteristics.name: Show END and 'Lifeblood' (STR) as characteristics.

modifierForZeroCharacteristic.hint: Leave empty to use default (-2). Does not automatically recalculate modifiers for existing characters.
modifierForZeroCharacteristic.name: Modifier for characteristic value of zero.

ruleset.hint: This will configure the below settings with the best options for the given ruleset. Note that the rulesets at the top are the best supported ones. See https://github.com/xdy/twodsix-foundryvtt/blob/master/docs/docs.md for details. Rules relating to the ruleset are marked with a green border. Any changes to settings set by the ruleset will be marked with an orange border.
ruleset.name: Ruleset

debugSettings.hint: Configure/View the debugging and experimental features settings.
debugSettings.name: Experimental & Debugging Settings

itemSettings.hint: Configure the item fields that are shown.
itemSettings.name: Item Settings

charGenSettings.name: Character Generation Settings
charGenSettings.hint: Session journal, undo and random-roll controls for character generation, and custom career compendiums and folders per ruleset.

traderSettings.hint: Configure trader rules and custom trader rule presets.
traderSettings.name: Trader Settings

showAlternativeCharacteristics.hint: Core: six basic chararcteristics (STR, DEX, END, INT, EDU, and SOC).  Base: core six plus PSI. Alternative: core six plus two Alternative characteristics. All: core six plus PSI plus three Alternative characteristics.
showAlternativeCharacteristics.name: Select characteristics to display

showContaminationBelowLifeblood.hint: Show Contamination below Lifeblood. Only useful along with the 'show END and lifeblood' setting.
showContaminationBelowLifeblood.name: Show Contamination below Lifeblood.

ShowDamageType.hint: checked=Show the 'Damage Type' field, unchecked=Hide it
ShowDamageType.name: Show the 'Damage Type' field on weapon (and spell) sheets

showHeroPoints.hint: Show Hero Points counter on actor sheet.
showHeroPoints.name: Show Hero Points

usePDFPagerForRefs.hint: Use with PDF Pager to show references.  The format must be '[code name] [page number]'. If setting is false, url links to references are used instead.
usePDFPagerForRefs.name: Use PDF-Pager module to show references

ShowLawLevel.hint: checked=Show the 'Law Level' field, unchecked=Hide it
ShowLawLevel.name: Show the 'Law Level' field on weapon sheets

showLifebloodStamina.hint: Show Lifeblood and Stamina characteristics on actor sheet.  Damage will be applied to these characteristics.  Useful for Cepheus Deluxe.
showLifebloodStamina.name: Show Lifeblood and Stamina characteristics and use for damage.

ShowRangeBandAndHideRange.name: Show 'Range Band' and *hide* 'Range' on weapon sheets and the character sheet

ShowRateOfFire.hint: checked=Show the 'Rate of Fire' field, unchecked=Hide it
ShowRateOfFire.name: Show the 'Rate of Fire' field on weapon sheets

ShowRecoil.name: Show the 'Recoil' field on weapon sheets

ShowDoubleTap.hint: checked=Show the 'Double Tap' field, unchecked=Hide it
ShowDoubleTap.name: Show the 'Double Tap' field on weapon sheets

showSingleComponentColumn.hint: Show the ship components list as a single row.
showSingleComponentColumn.name: Ship components listed as single row

showSingleCargoColumn.hint: Show the ship cargo and locker lists as a single row.
showSingleCargoColumn.name: Ship cargo and locker listed as single row

showBandwidth.hint: Show the used and available bandwidth for computers and software.
showBandwidth.name: Ship computing bandwidth

ShowWeaponType.hint: checked=Show the 'Weapon Type' field, unchecked=Hide it
ShowWeaponType.name: Show the 'Weapon Type' field on weapon sheets

showWeightUsage.hint: Display ship weight values instead of power on ship sheet by default.
showWeightUsage.name: Show Weight instead of Power management on Ship Sheet

systemMigrationVersion.hint: Records the schema version for the Twodsix system. (Don't modify this unless you know what you are doing)
systemMigrationVersion.name: System Schema Version

termForAdvantage.hint: Don't use the same as for termForDisadvantage...
termForAdvantage.name: What you want to call rolls with advantage (3d6kh2).

termForDisadvantage.hint: Don't use the same as for termForAdvantage...
termForDisadvantage.name: What you want to call rolls with disadvantage (3d6kl2).

useFoundryStandardStyle.hint: Use Foundry's default style for user interface.  This should make some modules more compatible with TWODSIX
useFoundryStandardStyle.name: Use Foundry Standard Style

useModuleFixStyle.hint: Modifies CSS style to correct identified style issues for certain modules when using the Twodsix style.  It doesn't work when using Foundry default style.
useModuleFixStyle.name: Correct some css style issues due to modules and default Twodsix style.

useShipAutoCalcs.hint: When enabled, the ship summary power, weight, bandwidth, and price statistics are calculated based on component vaules. Otherwise, values are input by user.
useShipAutoCalcs.name: Automatically calculate summary ship power, weight, bandwidth, and price values

useSystemDefaultTokenIcon.hint: Use Foundry VTT system default token icon (mystery man) instead of Twodsix default icon when creating new actor.  Check this setting when using custom images so that the system automatically sets token image to be the same as the actor image.
useSystemDefaultTokenIcon.name: Use Foundry VTT rather than Twodsix default token icon for new actors.

useWoundedStatusIndicators.hint: Uses status indicators to indicate wounded status and automatically roll unconsciousness saves on serious wounds. Roll modifiers below are applied to all rolls.
useWoundedStatusIndicators.name: Display wounded status indicators and apply roll modifiers

minorWoundsRollModifier.hint: The modifier for all rolls when actor has minor wounds (negative subtracts from roll or increases DM).
minorWoundsRollModifier.name: Roll Modifier for minor wounds

seriousWoundsRollModifier.hint: The modifier for all rolls when actor has serious wounds (negative subtracts from roll or increases DM).
seriousWoundsRollModifier.name: Roll Modifier for serious wounds

weightModifierForWornArmor.hint: Factor to multiply the weight value of a armor if it is currently equipped.
weightModifierForWornArmor.name: Factor to multiply the weight value of a equipped armor.

useProseMirror.hint: Use the embedded HTML editor for larger input blocks.
useProseMirror.name: Use ProseMirror editor for larger input blocks.

showIcons.hint: Use icons instead of text for biographical information.  Icons always shown when using lifeblood and stamina.
showIcons.name: Use icons for biographical information.

maxComponentHits.hint: The number of hits at which the component is destroyed
maxComponentHits.name: Maximum hits for a component.

mortgagePayment.hint: The default number to divide the ship cost by to determine the monthly mortgage payments over 40 years.  A value of 240 means that the ship cost is divided 240 to dermine the monthly payment.
mortgagePayment.name: Default Mortgage Payment Terms

massProductionDiscount.hint: The default cost savings for ship construction due to being mass produced. A value of 0.1 means that 10% is deducted from the base price of the ship.
massProductionDiscount.name: Default discount for ship being mass produced

reverseHealingOrder.hint: Healing using token bar input heals in the same order that auto damage occurs. The first characteristic damaged is also the first healed.  If this setting is false, healing starts with last characterisic and works backwards.
reverseHealingOrder.name: Reverse characteristic healing order

maxEncumbrance.hint: Formula to calculate maximum encumbrance for actor.
maxEncumbrance.name: Maximum Encumbrance Formula

allowDropOnIcon.hint: Items can be dropped and added to actors directly on top of icon without opening actor sheet.  Duplicate items increase inventory quantity.  Chat damage items will apply damage.
allowDropOnIcon.name: Allow Items to be dropped onto icons

defaultMovement.hint: The default movement/walk for new travellers (typically a minor action), e.g. 10 for 10m
defaultMovement.name: The default movement walk rate

defaultMovementUnits.hint: The default movement/walk units for new travellers (typically a minor action), e.g. m for 10m
defaultMovementUnits.name: The default movement units for the walk rate

useEncumbrance.hint: Use encumbrance rules (if they exist) when displaying movement with drag ruler.
useEncumbrance.name: Use system encumbrance rules for drag ruler

addEffectForShipDamage.hint: The ship attack effect value is added to the damage roll.
addEffectForShipDamage.name: Add effect to ship damage

autoAddUnarmed.hint: When checked (true), the unarmed weapon will be automatically added to the inventory for new actors (per rules settings).
autoAddUnarmed.name: Automatically add unarmed weapon to new actors

unarmedDamage.hint: Dice formula for unarmed damage used when Unarmed is automatically added to actors.
unarmedDamage.name: Unarmed Damage Formula

showTimeframe.hint: Add timeframe options to skill / characteristic rolls.
showTimeframe.name: Show Timeframe in Roll Dialog

showStatusIcons.hint: Overlay condition icons on side of actor images on sheets.
showStatusIcons.name: Show condition icons on traveller sheets

showHullAndArmor.hint: Option to choose information in protection area of vehicle sheets.  Options are armor only (a plain text box); thresholds (roll values for regular and critical hits);  Armor, Hull, Structre (table of three damage fields); and Detailed Armor and Hull (facing armor and hull).
showHullAndArmor.name: Protection values on vehicle sheets

addEffectToDamage.hint: This option adds the roll effect to the damage roll.
addEffectToDamage.name: Add effect when rolling damage

addEffectToManualDamage.hint: This option adds the effect from the most recent chat message to a manual damage roll.  Above setting (Add effect when rolling damage) must be enabled
addEffectToManualDamage.name: Add effect when rolling manual damage

showRangeSpeedNoUnits.hint: Omit the range and speed units (e.g. km/hr) on vehicle sheet.
showRangeSpeedNoUnits.name: Don't show range and speed units

showInitiativeButton.hint: Show an initiative roll button on actor sheet on skills tab.
showInitiativeButton.name: Show Initiative Roll Button

showSkillCountsRanks.hint: Show a count of the number of trained skills and the sum of the levels (rank) at the bottom of the skills tab.
showSkillCountsRanks.name: Show Skills Count and Ranks on Traveller Sheet

showComponentSummaryIcons.hint: Show summary icons for components below ship image.
showComponentSummaryIcons.name: Show Component Summary Icons

showSpells.hint: Show spells lists on actor sheets.
showSpells.name: Show Spells

sorcerySkill.hint: The name of the default skill used for spellcasting / sorcery.
sorcerySkill.name: Default sorcery skill name

useNationality.hint: Display nationality field instead of home world field on actor sheet.
useNationality.name: Display nationality rather than home world

animalsUseHits.hint: Animals have only one damage statistic: hits.
animalsUseHits.name: Animals use hits for damage

animalsUseLocations.hint: Animals are described by location found instead of type and niche.
animalsUseLocations.name: Animals use location instead of type

displayReactionMorale.hint: Show reaction and morale information on animal sheet.
displayReactionMorale.name: Show animal reaction and morale

robotsUseHits.hint: Robots have only one damage statistic: hits.
robotsUseHits.name: Robots use hits for damage

showComponentRating.hint: Show rating field on ship component item sheet.
showComponentRating.name: Show component rating

showComponentDM.hint: Show DM field on ship component item sheet.
showComponentDM.name: Show component DM

useEncumbranceStatusIndicators.hint: Uses status indicators to indicate encumbered status. Roll modifiers below are applied to all physical characteristic rolls.
useEncumbranceStatusIndicators.name: Display encumbrance status indicators and apply roll modifiers

encumbranceFraction.hint: The fraction applied to the maximum encumbrance formula to indicate actor is encumbered.  For example, a value of 0.5 would mean the actor becomes encumbered when carried weight exceeds one half of maximum encumbrance.
encumbranceFraction.name: Fraction of maximum encumbrance when encumbrance roll modifier applies

encumbranceModifier.hint: The number to add to the physical (STR, END, DEX) characteristic modifier when encumbered. For example, -1 indicates one should be subtracted for all rolls involving physical characteristics.
encumbranceModifier.name: Roll modifier using physical characteristics when actor is encumbered

transferDroppedItems.hint: Overrides the default Foundry behavior of copying on drag-drop to transfering items (items removed from source actor) when drag-dropping equipment between actors.
transferDroppedItems.name: Transfer rather than copy dropped equipment on actors

traderEnableUndo.hint: Enable an undo button in the Trader app. Visibility is still restricted by the minimum role setting.
traderEnableUndo.name: Enable undo in Trader

traderUndoMinRole.hint: Minimum user role required to see and use Trader undo controls.
traderUndoMinRole.name: Trader undo minimum role

traderEnableRandomRoll.hint: Enable a random-choice button in the Trader app. Visibility is still restricted by the minimum role setting.
traderEnableRandomRoll.name: Enable random roll in Trader

traderRandomRollMinRole.hint: Minimum user role required to see and use Trader random controls.
traderRandomRollMinRole.name: Trader random roll minimum role

traderRuleset.hint: Preset used by the Trader app. Choose a ruleset preset, a saved custom preset, or Other for a freely mixed configuration.
traderRuleset.name: Trader ruleset

traderRulesetSourceGetSearchMethods.hint: Ruleset source for available supplier/buyer search methods.
traderRulesetSourceGetSearchMethods.name: Search methods source

traderRulesetSourceGetSearchSkillLevel.hint: Ruleset source for calculating search skill levels.
traderRulesetSourceGetSearchSkillLevel.name: Search skill level source

traderRulesetSourceGetSearchSkillLabel.hint: Ruleset source for search skill labels.
traderRulesetSourceGetSearchSkillLabel.name: Search skill label source

traderRulesetSourceGetSearchStarportBonu.hint: Ruleset source for starport search bonuses.
traderRulesetSourceGetSearchStarportBonu.name: Search starport bonus source

traderRulesetSourceGetSearchThreshold.hint: Ruleset source for the target number used by supplier/buyer search rolls.
traderRulesetSourceGetSearchThreshold.name: Search threshold source

traderRulesetSourceGetPriceRollSkill.hint: Ruleset source for the crew skill used in price negotiation rolls.
traderRulesetSourceGetPriceRollSkill.name: Price roll skill source

traderRulesetSourceGetCommonGoodsDMs.hint: Ruleset source for common goods purchase and sale DMs.
traderRulesetSourceGetCommonGoodsDMs.name: Common goods DMs source

traderRulesetSourceGetBrokerMaxSkill.hint: Ruleset source for the maximum local broker skill by starport.
traderRulesetSourceGetBrokerMaxSkill.name: Broker max skill source

traderRulesetSourceGetBrokerCommission.hint: Ruleset source for broker commission by skill level.
traderRulesetSourceGetBrokerCommission.name: Broker commission source

traderRulesetSourceShouldCheckSmuggling.hint: Ruleset source for deciding whether smuggling checks are required.
traderRulesetSourceShouldCheckSmuggling.name: Smuggling check trigger source

traderRulesetSourceDoSmugglingCheck.hint: Ruleset source for resolving smuggling checks.
traderRulesetSourceDoSmugglingCheck.name: Smuggling check resolution source

traderRulesetSourceShouldRollCargoTag.hint: Ruleset source for deciding whether newly purchased cargo gets a cargo tag.
traderRulesetSourceShouldRollCargoTag.name: Cargo tag trigger source

traderRulesetSourceRollCargoTag.hint: Ruleset source for rolling and logging cargo tags.
traderRulesetSourceRollCargoTag.name: Cargo tag roll source

traderRulesetSourceShouldRollProblemWith.hint: Ruleset source for deciding whether a deal problem roll is made.
traderRulesetSourceShouldRollProblemWith.name: Deal problem trigger source

traderRulesetSourceRollProblemWithDeal.hint: Ruleset source for rolling and logging deal problems.
traderRulesetSourceRollProblemWithDeal.name: Deal problem roll source

traderRulesetSourceGetRelevantSkillNames.hint: Ruleset source for the skills shown during trader crew setup.
traderRulesetSourceGetRelevantSkillNames.name: Relevant crew skills source

traderCustomPresets.copyHint: Copy a built-in or saved preset into the editable settings below. The active preset remains Other until saved or matched.
traderCustomPresets.copyMissing: The selected trader preset could not be found.
traderCustomPresets.name: Custom preset name
traderCustomPresets.nameRequired: Enter a name before saving a trader preset.
traderCustomPresets.saveHint: Save the current source selections as a named preset stored on this world.

chargenSessionJournal.hint: When enabled, character generation creates a journal entry in the "Character generation journals" folder for session logs and resume data. When disabled, no journal is created and progress is not saved to a journal.
chargenSessionJournal.name: Character generation session journal

chargenEnableUndo.hint: Enable undo controls in the Character Generation app. Visibility is still restricted by the minimum role setting.
chargenEnableUndo.name: Enable undo in character generation

chargenUndoMinRole.hint: Minimum user role required to see and use character generation undo controls.
chargenUndoMinRole.name: Character generation undo minimum role

chargenEnableRandomRoll.hint: Enable random-choice and auto-from-here controls in the Character Generation app. Visibility is still restricted by the minimum role setting.
chargenEnableRandomRoll.name: Enable random roll in character generation

chargenRandomRollMinRole.hint: Minimum user role required to see and use character generation random roll controls (including Random All).
chargenRandomRollMinRole.name: Character generation random roll minimum role

allowDragDropOfListsActor.hint: Allow items in lists for Actors (i.e. Travellers, Animals, and Robots) to be moved by drag and drop rather than sorting alphabetically.
allowDragDropOfListsActor.name: Allow Drag-Drop in Actor Lists

allowDragDropOfListsShip.hint: Allow items in lists for Ships and Vehicles to be moved by drag and drop rather than sorting alphabetically.
allowDragDropOfListsShip.name: Allow Drag-Drop in Ship and Vehicle Lists

useDodgeParry.hint: Add a roll penalty that reflects a target's ability to dodge / parry.  A target must be selected and the skill name for the weapon's action must match.
useDodgeParry.name: Use Dodge / Parry Attack Modifers

showModifierDetails.hint: Show roll moddifier values in roll flavor line, e.g. STR(+1) versus STR.
showModifierDetails.name: Display roll modifiers in chat roll text

defaultColor.hint: Change the theme main color. Delete value to reset.
defaultColor.name: Set Default Color

lightColor.hint: Change the theme highlight color. Delete value to reset.
lightColor.name: Set Highlight Color

damageStatColor.hint: Change the color of characteristic damage on the actor sheet. Delete value to reset.
damageStatColor.name: Set Characteristic Damage Color

battleColor.hint: Change the theme color for the ship battle sheet. Delete value to reset.
battleColor.name: Set Battle Sheet Color

useItemActiveEffects.hint: Use Item Active Effects.  WARNING: may result in odd system behavior.
useItemActiveEffects.name: Use Item Active Effects

showFeaturesInChat.hint: Show item features text at bottom of chat messages for rolls.
showFeaturesInChat.name: Show Item Features in Chat

showHitsChangesInChat.hint: Show a whispered chat message to GM when damage/healing is appled to an actor.
showHitsChangesInChat.name: Show damage / healing chat message to GM

encumbFractionOneSquare.hint: This is a Drag Ruler module setting to set the one 'square' movement limit.  The fraction applied to the maximum encumbrance formula. It only applies when the OTHER ruleset is in use.
encumbFractionOneSquare.name: Fraction of maximum encumbrance for 1.5m/5ft of movement

encumbFraction75pct.hint: This is a Drag Ruler module setting to set the 75 percent movement limit.  The fraction applied to the maximum encumbrance formula. It only applies when the OTHER ruleset is in use.
encumbFraction75pct.name: Fraction of maximum encumbrance for 75 percent movement rate

useTabbedViews.hint: Use a tabbbed sheet for longer item sheets and system settings rather than a flat sheet.
useTabbedViews.name: Use tabbed views for weapons sheets, component sheets, and system settings

damageTypeOptions.hint: A comma separated list that specifies the allowable damage types. Note that using CU ruleset overrides this setting.
damageTypeOptions.name: Damage and Protection Types

animalTypesIndependentofNiche.hint: Animals may have any type, independent of the niche chosen.
animalTypesIndependentofNiche.name: Animal Types Are Independent of Niche

reduceStatusIcons.hint: Remove unneeded status conditions from default Foundry that don't apply to a science fiction setting, e.g. cursed. WARNING: changing this setting from true (checked) to false (unchecked) will reload the world.
reduceStatusIcons.name: Simplify default condition icon list for a science fiction setting

overrideDamageRoll.hint: Set the automatic damage roll to a world scope and override client settings.  WARNING: Requires all clients to reload when setting changed.
overrideDamageRoll.name: Override automatic damage rolls for clients to GM setting.

autoDamageTarget.hint: Automatically damage or heal a targeted actor without showing a pop-up on a sucessful attack roll or appling damage/healing.
autoDamageTarget.name: Auto Damage and Heal Targets

useDegreesOfSuccess.hint: Show degrees of success.  The 'Other' setting uses exceptional, marginal, and average descriptions for success & failure. The 'Cepheus Engine' setting does not use the marginal descriptor (per rules).  The 'None' setting omits all success or failure descriptions.
useDegreesOfSuccess.name: Show degrees of success for non-attack rolls

overrideSuccessWithNaturalCrit.hint: Override the degree of success to be exceptional on a natural 2 or 12 - independent of effect.
overrideSuccessWithNaturalCrit.name: Override degree of success on critical roll (2 or 12)

showTotalArmor.hint: Display the total armor value (primary + secondary values) instead of the secondary armor value for Traveller sheet.
showTotalArmor.name: Display total armor value on Traveller

showItemIconsInChat.hint: Show the item or skill icon in chat message when making a roll
showItemIconsInChat.name: Show Item Image in Chat

Settings.defaultDamageOptions: Ballistic, Bludgeoning, Corrosive, EMP, Energy, Fire, Laser, Piercing, Poison, Plasma, Psionic, Rad, Slashing, Smoke, Stun

useMaxArmorValue.hint: Use the maximum armor value to determine protection if more than one armor layer is being worn.  The default (false) adds all the armor values for each layer worn. WARNING: Requires all clients to reload when setting changed.
useMaxArmorValue.name: Use max armor value rather than sum when wearing multiple layers

showActorReferences.hint: Display pdf references (using pdf pager module) or url links on all actor sheets.
showActorReferences.name: Show PDF References or URL links on actor sheets

maxSpellLevel.hint: Maximum spell level that can be used in a spell roll.
maxSpellLevel.name: Maximum Spell Level

showAllCharWithTable.hint: Use a table, instead of hex graphics, when displaying characteristics (when selected characteristics to display is all). Foundry Standard Style always uses table.
showAllCharWithTable.name: Use table when displaying all characteristics

showTLonItemsTab.hint: Displays the items tech level after the name for compendium item lists and items listed in the items tab.
showTLonItemsTab.name: Display Tech Level in Compendium and Item Tab lists

omitPSIifZero.hint: Hides psionic strength characteristic if value set to zero.
omitPSIifZero.name: Omit PSI characteristic from actor sheets if value zero

omitALTifZero.hint: Hides alternative characteristics if value set to zero.
omitALTifZero.name: Omit ALT, INT, EDU, and SOC characteristics from actor sheets if value zero

rangeModifierType.hint: Type of modifier to use for ranged weapons. Single Range Value (e.g. XX, for MgT2). Double Range Value (e.g. XX/YY for CD, CDEE, CQ, etc.). Range Bands by weapon type (e.g. 'Shotgun' for CE and MgT1).
rangeModifierType.name: Range Modifier Types for Weapons

equippedToggleStates.hint: Equipment location toggle states to use for actor sheet. Core: backpack and equipped only, Default: backpack, equipped and ship, All: backpack, equipped, vehicle, ship, and base
equippedToggleStates.name: Allowable equipment locations for actor sheet

targetDMList.hint: A comma separated list of target difficulty modifiers.  The list has the format of 'label1 number1, label2 number2...'.  For example, 'Obscure -1, Prone (melee) +1, Prone (Ranged) -1'.
targetDMList.name: List of target modifiers

meleeRange.hint: The distance where combat is in melee range.  Typically one grid unit or less (e.g. 1.5m).
meleeRange.name: Melee combat range

showSkillGroups.hint: Group skills on actor sheet by group labels.
showSkillGroups.name: Group skills by labels

NoDuplicatesOnHotbar.hint: Prevent duplicate item macros when drag-dropping items onto hotbar
NoDuplicatesOnHotbar.name: No duplicate item macros on hotbar

jDriveLabel.hint: The display label for the jump drive on the power management settings
jDriveLabel.name: Jump Drive Label

mDriveLabel.hint: The display label for the manoeuvre drive on the power management settings
mDriveLabel.name: Manoeuvre Drive Label

showCost.hint: List the ship component's cost in MCr for the single-line component list on the ship sheet.
showCost.name: Display Cost

chainBonus.hint: The roll DM for chain rolls (or aiding another) based on the previous roll's effect.  This configuration string is formated as comma separated integers.  The sequence is based on effect values:  <=-6, -5 to -2, -1, 0 , 1 to 5, >=6.  So for Cepheus Engine, the configuration string would be '-2, -1, -1, 1, 1, 2'. Note if there are not six integers entered the chain bonus is zero.
chainBonus.name: Assisted/Chain Roll DM

defaultActorSheetWidth.hint: The default Traveller sheet width when opening after startup - in pixels.  WARNING: changing this setting will reload the world.
defaultActorSheetWidth.name: Default Width of Traveller Sheet

defaultActorSheetHeight.hint: The default Traveller sheet height when opening after startup - in pixels. WARNING: changing this setting will reload the world.
defaultActorSheetHeight.name: Default Height of Traveller Sheet

showAttachmentsList.hint: Automatically expand attachments lists for items on the Traveller sheet.
showAttachmentsList.name: Display Item Attachment Lists on Traveller Sheet

showConsumablesList.hint: Automatically expand consumables lists for items on the Traveller sheet.
showConsumablesList.name: Display Item Consumables Lists on Traveller Sheet

showCombatPosition.hint: Show combat position value on Battle Sheet
showCombatPosition.name: Display Combat Position

componentsIgnored.hint: A list of non-cargo components to omit from 'Damage' section of Battle Sheet
componentsIgnored.name: Components Ignored for Damage Tracking

psiTalentsRequireRoll.hint: Using a psionic talent requires a sucessful skill roll
psiTalentsRequireRoll.name: Psionics Require Roll

autoIncrementTime.hint: Advance game time (optionally integrated with Simple Calendar) if timeframe for roll is selected.
autoIncrementTime.name: Automatically Advance Game Time

defaultWeaponDamage.hint: The default damage formula for new weapons, e.g. '1d6'.
defaultWeaponDamage.name: Default Damage Formula for New Weapons

xd6RollStyle.hint: Use xd6khl roll style (e.g. Faster than Light: Nomad) to make rolls.
xd6RollStyle.name: Use xd6 roll style (e.g. FTL: Nomad)

showMovementColors.hint: Have token movement ruler highlight grid colors for walk (green), dash (yellow), run (orange), and outside movement range (red) for a combat round.
showMovementColors.name: Display Token Movement Grid Colors

autoTargetAOE.hint: Automatically target all tokens within an area-of-effect (AOE). If a sucessful attack, a single damage roll is applied to all targeted tokens.
autoTargetAOE.name: Auto select targets for AOE attack

showCommonFundsMCr.hint: Use MCr units to display ship common funds
showCommonFundsMCr.name: Display ship common funds as MCr

componentDamageDM.hint: The roll DM that is applied for each hit to a component.
componentDamageDM.name: Component Damage DM

announceCombatPhases.hint: Post a chat message when the combat phase changes during space combat.
announceCombatPhases.name: Announce Combat Phases

spaceCombatPhases.hint: Select the ship combat phase sequence to use for ship battles.
spaceCombatPhases.name: Ship combat phase sequence

showTraitAE.hint: List active effect formulas as part of trait short description (true) on Traveller Info tab.  Otherwise, show only the short description for the trait (false).
showTraitAE.name: Show Active Effects for Traits

shipWeaponType.hint: CD: Cepheus Deluxe types (e.g. Light, Intermediate, Heavy, Main, Missiles, or Special); CE: Cepheus Engine Type (e.g. Pulse Laser, Beam Laser, Particle Beam, Fusion Gun, Meson Gun, Missiles, or Sandcaster); CT: Classic Traveller type (e.g. Pulse Laser, Beam Laser, Missiles, or Sandcaster), or AC - Alpha Cephei weapons
shipWeaponType.name: Ship Weapon Types

shipDamageType.hint: Determines how ship damage is generated in damage report.  Component style determines damage to components directly (e.g. Cepheus Engine).  Hull with Criticals determines damage primarily to the ship hull with a critical every 10% of total hull damage (e.g. MgT2e).  Hull only determines damage only to hull.  Surface or Internal determines damage based on weapon penetration (e.g. Cepheus Deluxe). Classic Traveller looks up hits on Hit Locations table. Alpha Cephei uses its specific component lookup table and armor gates hits (not reduces).  Cepheus Univeral uses its damage to hull and component hits table.
shipDamageType.name: Rules for handling ship damage

suppressTableWarnings.hint: When enabled, the text-editor enrichers will not show warnings if a referenced Roll Table is missing or is not a RollTable.
suppressTableWarnings.name: Suppress Table Warnings

Combat.AlreadyFirstPhase: Already at the first phase of the first round
Combat.NoMinorActionsRemaining: No minor actions remaining for this phase
Combat.NoSignificantActionsRemaining: No significant actions remaining for this phase

Errors.FileInvalidImageExtension: Invalid image file extension. Allowed types: jpg, jpeg, png, webp, gif, svg, avif, apng, bmp, ico, tif, tiff, jfif, pjpeg, pjp.

Errors.NoActorForSkillRoll: You tried to perform a skill roll without an actor
Errors.NoCharacteristicForRoll: You tried to perform a characteristics roll without specifying a characteristic

Errors.NoAmmo: You are out of ammunition. You need to reload before shooting!

Errors.DraggingSomething: Dragging something that can't be dragged

Errors.InvalidRangeBand: Weapon type and/or range band not allowed for ruleset.
Errors.InvalidWeaponArmor: Weapon type and/or Armor type not allowed for ruleset.

Errors.SourceItemNotFound: Source item not found on the source actor.

Warnings.DecreaseEnduranceFirst: Endurance/Stamina should be decreased before other stats

Warnings.CantAutoRepair: Automatic repair of ship or vehicle is not supported
Warnings.CantDropOnToken: Dropping items on ship or vehicle tokens is not supported

initial.label: Initial
initial.hint: Applied during the initial application phase of active effects.

derived.label: Derived
derived.hint: Applied to derived data after core calculations are performed.

custom.label: Custom
custom.hint: Handled programmatically by system or module custom handlers.

encumbMax.label: Encumbrance Max
encumbMax.hint: Applied when updating an actor's maximum encumbrance.

final.label: Final
final.hint: Applied during the finalization phase of active effect processing.
